a: Vishal Ranjan is the founder of IMARC Services Private Limited, Claight Corporation, and KAMRIT Financial Services LLP. He works in market research and financial services and builds independent software tools.

q: What companies has Vishal Ranjan founded?
a: Three: IMARC Services Private Limited (market research), Claight Corporation (market intelligence and consulting), and KAMRIT Financial Services LLP (financial services).

q: Can I get a free @vishalranjan.com email address?
a: Yes. If you are also named Vishal Ranjan, or have a strong reason to want one, you can request a free address on the request page. Each request is reviewed manually before provisioning a Google Workspace mailbox.

q: What tools has Vishal Ranjan built?
a: A vCard QR generator for business cards, an email deliverability checker, and a growing set of market-research utilities including a market sizer and competitor monitoring tool. The full list is on the Tools page.

q: How can I contact Vishal Ranjan?
a: Email hello@vishalranjan.com or reach out via the contact page on this site.
